{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Redmoon Overlord
| introduced = Wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Hollow King]]'s [[Spear]] drove through the spirit of a [[Redmoon Overlord]], destroying his soul.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27">''Wintersteel'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[void key]] was scavenged from a [[Redmoon Overlord]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
